title: Power of Emotional Intelligence in Conflict Management
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable workplace effectiveness workshop for strengthening power of emotional intelligence in conflict management.
whyThisMatters: Power of Emotional Intelligence in Conflict Management helps employees and supervisors strengthen power of emotional intelligence in conflict management through clearer communication, practical tools, and better everyday work habits. Participants explore Overview of Emotional Intelligence (EI) and Emotional Quotient (EQ), The importance of raising self-awareness, and Taking control of your behavioural patterns so the learning can be translated into immediate action at work.
builtFor: Employees who need stronger communication or personal effectiveness habits
walkAwayWith: Communicate and organize work with more clarity and confidence.
Apply practical tools to improve decisions, writing, planning, or collaboration.
Recognize habits that affect personal and team performance.
Build action steps for better day-to-day effectiveness.

modules.title: Power of Emotional Intelligence in Conflict Management
Overview of Emotional Intelligence (EI) and Emotional Quotient (EQ)
Taking control of your behavioural patterns

methodologyCaption: The workshop combines short inputs, practical exercises, and reflection so participants can translate the topic into everyday work habits.
